chunks.response:
The file has been emptied. The entire content was a single CSS rule targeting `.pf-v6-c-select.isScrollable .pf-v6-c-select__menu` which is dead code because:

- The PatternFly Select component was completely rebuilt in v6 and no longer uses the `pf-c-select` CSS class structure.
- The scrollable behavior this override was providing (max-height + overflow-y) can now be controlled via the `maxMenuHeight` prop on the new `Select`/`MenuContainer` component or through the `isScrollable` prop directly on the PatternFly v6 Menu component.
- No other files in the project import `select-overrides.css`, so no import cleanup was needed.
